message:
feat(algorithms): add is_chordal via Maximum Cardinality Search

New algorithm: is_chordal detects whether a graph is chordal (every
cycle of length 4+ has a chord) using MCS-based perfect elimination
ordering. Matches NetworkX on all tested graph families.

Implementation: MCS produces vertex ordering, reversed for PEO
numbering, then checks that each vertex's later neighbors form a clique.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -392,6 +392,7 @@ class EdgePartition(Enum):
 
 # Planarity
 from franken_networkx._fnx import is_planar
+from franken_networkx._fnx import is_chordal
 
 # Barycenter
 from franken_networkx._fnx import barycenter
@@ -1711,6 +1712,7 @@ def from_scipy_sparse_array(A, parallel_edges=False, create_using=None,
     "is_attracting_component",
     # Algorithms — planarity
     "is_planar",
+    "is_chordal",
     # Algorithms — barycenter
     "barycenter",
     # Generators — classic
